name: writhing_stalker.live_quiet_side_zombie_pressure_mcw
description: Live local-evidence zombie-shadow row: zombies pressure the east/front side and the stalker shadow destination chooses a west/quiet-side cutoff tile. This row deliberately does not claim overmap-interest footing.

steps.label: post_load_quiet_side_zombie_pressure_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: vulnerable-midnight local-evidence stalker plus east-side zombie-pressure fixture loads to live map

steps.label: audit_saved_midnight_before_quiet_side_pressure
steps.abort_reason: installed save did not prove expected midnight before quiet-side zombie-pressure window
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved turn proves local midnight before quiet-side zombie-pressure window

steps.label: audit_saved_monsters_before_quiet_side_pressure
steps.abort_reason: saved active_monsters metadata did not contain required local-evidence stalker plus east-side zombie-pressure footing
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved active_monsters proves stalker plus east-side ordinary zombies before live window

steps.label: toggle_safe_mode_off_before_quiet_side_pressure
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode is toggled off so the bounded live turn window is not consumed by warnings

steps.label: advance_quiet_side_zombie_pressure_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: bounded live turn window runs from local evidence and selects a quiet-side cutoff opposite the east zombie pressure

steps.label: audit_writhing_stalker_quiet_side_pressure_live_plan
steps.abort_reason: same-run artifact lacked local-evidence live_plan plus quiet_cutoff lines proving east zombie-pressure side maps to a west/quiet-side cutoff tile
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact proves the actual live shadow-destination path chose the quiet side from local evidence; overmap interest is explicitly not claimed

evidence_contract.claim: local-evidence-only zombie pressure from the east/front side feeds the live shadow-destination path and chooses a west/quiet-side cutoff tile
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for writhing-stalker zombie-shadow live behavior
evidence_contract.scope_note: This first live row deliberately does not prove overmap-interest footing; live_context currently leaves has_overmap_interest_footing false and still requires local evidence before response.
evidence_contract.writeback_note: No save/writeback gate: this scenario proves bounded live-plan behavior from current-run logs plus saved start-state footing; persistent map mutation is not part of the product claim.
